alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices & Services with two promotions; experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; demonstrates ability to shape organizational processes and strategy.
alignments.job_requirement: Help define our sales motion: We're an early team, and your work will directly impact how our GTM function operates and succeeds.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient in SQL (joins, GROUP BY, subqueries, window functions), BigQuery, advanced Excel/Sheets, Looker dashboarding; owns data-driven analysis and reporting cadence design.
alignments.job_requirement: Analytical mindset: Ability to analyze market trends, identify opportunities, and make data-driven decisions.

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product Operations and GTM Strategy background with cross-functional program execution; Salesforce admin partnering with engineering on feature requests; experience orchestrating commercial transformation across teams.
alignments.job_requirement: Collaborate cross-functionally: Work closely with our broader GTM team, as well as our product, technical and operations orgs to deliver our industry-leading product.

gaps.gap: Pure quota-carrying enterprise sales (10+ years closing $1M+ deals, prospecting, negotiating, closing complex deals)
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's revenue-operations and commercial background provides deal-flow understanding and pricing-execution familiarity, but lacks direct hunter/closer sales experience and pipeline-ownership track record.

gaps.gap: Spanish language fluency required (professional fluency in both Spanish and English)
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is fluent in English and German; Spanish fluency is not stated. Role is based in Madrid and requires professional bilingual communication with Spanish customers.

gaps.gap: Enterprise customer relationship management and account ownership
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has internal and partner stakeholder management but no stated evidence of large-account relationship ownership, customer success ownership, or end-to-end enterprise deal cycle experience.

gaps.gap: AI industry knowledge and GTM expertise in emerging AI platforms
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is actively building with LLM agents and understands AI tooling, but no stated background in AI-product GTM, competitive positioning, or enterprise AI sales landscape navigation.

output.level_rationale: Sales Director at early-stage AI company. 10+ years enterprise sales, $1M+ quota, complex-deal ownership, and GTM-motion definition responsibility. Title and account-scale indicate L5-L6 range. no stated management span. Early-stage context and strategic GTM input push toward upper-L5 / low-L6.
output.summary: This is a pure quota-carrying enterprise sales role (Sales Director, Spain; 10+ years, $1M+ deals, prospecting/closing/negotiating as core duties). Candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with commercial and revenue-operations background, not a hunter-closer. Critical blockers: no stated sales experience, no Spanish fluency (role is Madrid-based and requires bilingual Spanish/English), no large-account relationship ownership, and no enterprise deal-cycle closing history. Role family misalignment (belongs to Sales, not Strategy/Ops/Product Ops families) and seniority mismatch (L5–L6 sales role vs. L4–L5 operations/strategy target) make this a fundamental fit gap. Candidate should skip unless she is considering a career pivot into quota-carrying enterprise sales."
uncertainties: Company stage (funding, ARR, team size) not stated in JD; assumes Series A/B scaling based on founder profiles and multi-office footprint.
Spanish fluency not stated in candidate profile; unable to assess Madrid-based bilingual requirement.
Whether 'define sales motion' suggests a Head of Sales or GTM leadership scope hidden in this IC posting remains ambiguous; if true, role could be L6+, further from target band.
Candidate's Commercial Operations at Google Devices may have included enterprise segments, but evidence of hunter/closer sales experience or quota ownership is not supplied.
